artifacts.description: Shared max-suffix event_id allocation and append-only ledger helper.

Use shared event_id allocation, record malformed Gemini output as Resource Failure, strengthen independence instructions, correct approval_mode metadata, remove dead code, and enforce Tier3-only except smoke.
Detect duplicate event_id unless append-only correction explicitly suppresses a legacy duplicate.
Regression checks for max-suffix event ids, malformed output Resource Failure, structured negative FAIL, and approval-mode plan command shape.
Document plan-mode semantics, independence guard, malformed output handling, Tier2 smoke exception, and prompt artifact gitignore policy.

change_summary: Closed combined Validator-B review findings with runner fixes, ledger validation hardening, behavior regression tests, live negative smoke evidence, and doc/policy alignment.
self_review: Local node --check, check-validator-b-regressions, live Gemini negative smoke, audit:harness, and git diff --check passed before Validator-A handoff.

log.result: node --check, audit:harness, git diff --check, and live Validator-B negative smoke passed.
